title: War to end in ‘weeks, not months’: Rubio says no need to send ground troops to Iran
summary_full: US secretary of state Marco Rubio stated military operations against Iran are expected to conclude within weeks, not months, without ground troops. Despite ongoing conflict and disruptions to global energy supplies, Washington anticipates a response to its 15-point proposal aimed at ending the war, as Iran faces further strikes on its infrastructure.
